condition: Displayed value and stored value are identical, correctly rounded (Decimal).
task: Exchange EUR→USD and assert the credited history amount equals the displayed 'You get'.
title: Conversion rounds wrong into history

condition: P&L sign matches actual gain/loss.
task: Open Portfolio and assert TSLA's P&L renders as a loss (negative, red).
title: Loss displayed as gain

condition: The credited amount reflects the displayed fee.
expectedBuggy: Fee ignored — credited amount is higher than shown.
expectedClean: Credited amount reflects the displayed fee.
task: Exchange and assert the credited amount matches the fee-deducted 'You get'.
title: Exchange ignores the fee it displays

condition: P&L percent is measured against cost basis.
task: Assert portfolio P&L % equals P&L ÷ cost basis.
title: P&L % divides by market value, not cost

condition: Total balance sums every account.
expectedBuggy: GBP account omitted from the total.
task: Assert Home total equals the sum of all three accounts.
title: Total balance omits an account

condition: Balances round to the nearest cent.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Total balance floored, not rounded

condition: The daily change sign matches the actual move.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Today's change sign flipped

condition: A transfer debits the selected account.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Transfer debits the wrong account

condition: Balance-after = balance − amount.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: 'Balance after' adds instead of subtracts

condition: The exact amount is transferred.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Transfer amount rounded up

condition: Conversion uses the correct directional rate.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Exchange uses the inverse rate

condition: The bought currency lands in its account.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Exchange credits the wrong account

condition: The fee is charged once.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Exchange fee charged twice

condition: 'You get' shows the net, post-fee amount.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: 'You get' shows the pre-fee amount

condition: The percent change sign matches the price move.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Market % change sign flipped

condition: The detail price matches the market price.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Asset detail price is offset

condition: Percent change is measured against the day open.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Detail % uses base, not day open

condition: Estimated total = quantity × price.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Order total ignores quantity

condition: A limit order executes at the limit price.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Limit order executes at market

condition: Position value uses the live price.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Holding value uses cost, not price

condition: Invested value sums every holding.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Portfolio total omits a holding

condition: P&L percent keeps its sign.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: P&L % shown as absolute value

condition: Limit sell below market warns; qty must be > 0.
expectedClean: Zero qty blocked; below-market limit sell warns.
task: Set qty to 0 and assert Review is disabled; place a below-market limit sell and assert a warning shows.
title: Bad limit orders accepted silently

condition: Continue requires an amount greater than zero.
task: Enter recipient and amount 0; assert Continue is disabled.
title: Zero-amount transfer allowed

condition: Leading/trailing whitespace is trimmed before validation.
expectedBuggy: Spaces accepted as a valid recipient.
task: Enter a spaces-only recipient; assert Continue stays disabled.
title: Recipient whitespace not trimmed

condition: The app passcode must be the full required length.
task: During passcode setup, assert a 4-digit passcode is rejected (6 required).
title: Short passcode accepted

condition: Continue is blocked when the amount exceeds the balance.
task: Enter an amount above the balance; assert Continue is disabled.
title: Transfer over balance allowed

condition: Transfer amounts must be positive.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Negative transfer amount accepted

condition: Sell and get currencies must differ.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Exchange to the same currency allowed

condition: Search is case-insensitive.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Transaction search is case-sensitive

condition: You cannot review a sell you can't cover.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Sell reviewable with no holding

condition: The order ticket opens with a valid quantity.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Order quantity defaults to zero

condition: Login requires a username and password.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Login accepts empty credentials

condition: The monthly limit must be positive.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Card monthly limit accepts zero

condition: Amounts parse correctly under the active locale.
task: Type '1,000.50' into an amount field under en_US; assert it parses to 1000.50.
title: 1,000.50 parsed as 1.00050

condition: Dates render in a stable, correct timezone.
expectedBuggy: Dates shifted to a far-off timezone.
expectedClean: Dates in the app's home timezone.
task: Open Transactions and assert a known transaction's day/time matches the home timezone.
title: Transaction date shifts by timezone

condition: The currency symbol matches the selected currency.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Balance always shows the € symbol

condition: Prices show two fraction digits.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Prices shown without decimals

condition: Search input is trimmed before matching.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Search doesn't trim whitespace

condition: Balance reflects latest state after any mutation.
expectedBuggy: Home keeps showing the pre-transfer balance.
task: Note the Home balance, make a transfer, return to Home; assert the balance decreased.
title: Dashboard shows pre-transfer balance

condition: Each transaction appears once.
task: Tap Load more and assert each transaction id appears exactly once.
title: Transaction duplicated after Load more

condition: Toggle state persists and reads back correctly.
task: Turn on Freeze; assert the FROZEN badge appears.
title: Freeze toggle reads back inverted

condition: A filter shows only its own category.
task: Select the Money-in filter; assert every visible row is money-in.
title: Money-in filter leaks money-out rows

condition: A filled order reports filled, not pending.
task: Place a market order; assert the status reports filled.
title: Filled order still shows pending

condition: Each quick action opens its own screen.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Transfer action opens Exchange

condition: Recent activity shows the last four items.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Recent activity shows too few rows

condition: The rate recomputes when the pair changes.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Rate stale after swapping direction

condition: A filter shows only its own category.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Money-out filter leaks money-in rows

condition: Search matches title and category.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Search ignores the category field

condition: Each segment shows only its asset kind.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Crypto appears in the Stocks segment

condition: The watchlist shows only watched symbols.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Watchlist shows every asset

condition: Tapping a row opens that row's asset.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Tapping an asset opens the wrong one

condition: The Buy button starts a buy order.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Buy opens a Sell order ticket

condition: The buy side buys.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Buy side actually sells

condition: Toggle state persists and reads back correctly.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Online-payments toggle reads inverted

condition: The confirmation shows the entered recipient.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Confirm sheet shows wrong recipient

condition: Confirm is idempotent; one tap = one transaction.
task: Rapidly double-tap Confirm; assert exactly one transaction / one debit.
title: Rapid double-tap sends twice

condition: Confirmation price equals the price acted on.
task: Read the asset price, tap Buy, and assert the order's reference price equals it.
title: Order price ≠ tapped price

condition: Place is idempotent; one tap = one order.
task: Double-tap Place order; assert only one order/holding change occurs.
title: Rapid double-tap places two orders

condition: Execute is idempotent; one tap = one exchange.
task: Double-tap Exchange; assert only one exchange executes.
title: Rapid double-tap exchanges twice

condition: A stale refresh never overwrites a newer one.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Overlapping refreshes clobber the dashboard

condition: Long lists render lazily and stay smooth.
expectedBuggy: Whole huge list rendered at once → hitches.
task: Open Transactions and assert scrolling stays responsive / paginated.
title: History renders a huge non-lazy list

condition: Work stays off the main thread; the UI never hangs.
task: Open Portfolio and assert the tab becomes responsive within a small budget.
title: Portfolio blocks the main thread on open

condition: The live feed polls at a sane interval.
task: In live mode, assert the quote endpoint isn't polled excessively.
title: Live feed polls 10× too often

condition: Expensive work is not redone on every render.
expectedBuggy: Whole list re-sorted on every render.
task: Profile Transactions rendering; assert the list isn't re-sorted each render.
title: History re-sorts on every render

condition: Sparklines use a small point budget.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Sparklines compute thousands of points

condition: Grouping is not redone wastefully.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: History regroups expensively each render

condition: A disabled-looking control is actually non-interactive.
expectedBuggy: Button looks disabled but is hittable.
task: With an invalid form, assert Continue reports isEnabled == false.
title: Button looks disabled but still fires

condition: Resend is blocked until the cooldown elapses.
task: On the OTP screen, assert Resend is disabled until the cooldown elapses.
title: OTP resend ignores the cooldown

condition: A successful action shows a confirmation toast.
task: Complete a transfer; assert the success toast appears.
title: No success toast after a transfer

condition: All accounts appear in the strip.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: GBP account card hidden

condition: Outgoing amounts show a leading minus.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Outgoing amounts shown without a minus

condition: The count reflects the filtered total.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Transaction count label is wrong

condition: High ≥ low in the stats grid.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Day high/low stats swapped

condition: The stepper changes quantity by one.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Quantity stepper increments by two

condition: The displayed expiry is in the future.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Card expiry shown in the past

condition: The OTP field starts empty.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: OTP field pre-filled with the real code

condition: Confirmation stays visible long enough to read.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Success toast flashes too briefly

condition: Every element has a unique, stable accessibility identifier.
expectedClean: Every row has a unique identifier.
task: In Markets, assert each asset identifier matches exactly one element.
title: Two market rows share one identifier

condition: Every control exposes a meaningful accessibility label.
task: Assert the Place-order button exposes a non-empty accessibility label.
title: Place-order button has no accessibility label

condition: A control's accessibility label matches its action.
task: Assert the Buy button's accessibility label reads 'Buy'.
title: Buy button is labelled 'Sell'

condition: List rows expose a meaningful label.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Market rows expose no accessibility label

condition: Controls expose a meaningful label.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Freeze toggle has no accessibility label

condition: Sensitive screens always require the gate.
task: Unlock, background then foreground the app; assert re-auth is required.
title: Gate skipped after backgrounding

condition: Sensitive screens are obscured when the app is inactive.
expectedClean: Sensitive content is covered when inactive.
task: Send the app to the inactive/switcher state; assert the privacy cover appears.
title: Sensitive data visible in app switcher

condition: An expired one-time code is rejected.
task: Let the OTP expire (>20s), enter the code; assert it is rejected.
title: Expired OTP still accepted

condition: Too many wrong codes locks the OTP step.
task: Enter a wrong code 3×; assert the OTP step locks.
title: No lockout after repeated wrong OTP

condition: An idle session re-locks after the timeout.
task: Leave the app idle past the timeout; assert it re-locks.
title: Session never times out

condition: Secrets live in the Keychain, never in UserDefaults.
task: After login, inspect storage; assert the session token is NOT in UserDefaults.
title: Session token stored in UserDefaults

condition: The card PAN is masked except the last 4 digits.
task: Assert the card number is masked except the last four digits.
title: Full card number shown unmasked

condition: The CVV is never displayed on screen.
task: Assert no CVV is shown on the card face.
title: CVV shown on the card face

condition: Secrets are never logged.
expectedBuggy: OTP code written to the console.
task: Inspect the console during OTP; assert the code is never logged.
title: OTP code written to the console log

condition: The PIN is masked until explicitly revealed.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: PIN shown in plaintext

condition: Only the correct OTP is accepted.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: OTP accepts any 6-digit code

condition: Only the stored passcode unlocks.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Passcode entry accepts any code

condition: The passcode is never persisted in plaintext.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Passcode stored in UserDefaults

condition: Credentials are never logged.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Login credentials written to the console

condition: Retries are idempotent; a retried request never double-posts.
task: Trigger a timeout, tap Retry; assert only one transaction/debit results.
title: Retry after slow response duplicates the payment

condition: An out-of-order/late response never clobbers newer data.
expectedBuggy: Stale response clobbers the fresh balance.
task: Switch the sell currency quickly; assert the balance shows the newest currency.
title: Stale response overwrites fresh state

condition: A failed/timed-out request is surfaced as an error, not success.
task: Make a transfer that times out; assert an error (not success) is shown.
title: Timeout shown as a successful transfer

condition: A stale cache is refreshed or clearly marked as stale.
expectedBuggy: Reads keep serving a stale snapshot.
task: Mutate a balance and refresh; assert reads reflect the change.
title: Offline cache shows an outdated balance

condition: A read error is surfaced, not shown as a zero balance.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Balance read returns zero on error

condition: A fetch returns each row once.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Every transaction fetched twice

condition: Reads reflect the latest holdings.
task: Reproduce the defect and write a stable test that fails only when active.
title: Holdings read is stale after an order

condition: Value-change animations complete within a stable, bounded time.
expectedBuggy: Settle time jitters per tick — a wait-for-idle step flakes.
expectedClean: Flash animation settles within a stable, bounded duration.
task: Open Markets in live mode and assert a price cell settles to its neutral colour within a bounded time on every tick.
title: Ticker flash animation is unstable

condition: When offline, the UI clearly indicates it and serves cached data.
expectedBuggy: No banner — the app serves cached data silently.
task: Enable offline mode (dev menu network selector) and assert the offline banner is shown on the current screen.
title: No offline indicator while offline

condition: Pagination terminates once every matching row is shown.
expectedBuggy: Load more never stops — the list grows forever.
expectedClean: Load more stops when the list is exhausted.
task: Tap Load more repeatedly and assert pagination terminates once every matching row is shown.
title: Pagination never ends

condition: Concurrent read-modify-write increments are atomic; none are lost.
expectedBuggy: Increments are lost to a race; counter < start + N.
expectedClean: Concurrent increments are atomic; counter == start + N.
task: On the dev-menu Sync playground, run the concurrent +1 batch and assert the counter equals start + N.
title: Concurrent increments lose updates

condition: A deep link still requires the auth gate before showing content.
expectedBuggy: Deep link opens the target screen without any auth.
expectedClean: Deep links land on the auth gate until unlocked.
task: Cold-launch a deep link (e.g. chaosbank://markets) while locked and assert the auth gate is still shown.
title: Deep link opens a screen without auth

condition: The unread badge reflects the actual unread count.
expectedBuggy: Badge stays at the original count after reading.
expectedClean: Badge reflects the unread count (0 after reading).
task: Open the notification centre from Home, dismiss it, and assert the unread badge cleared.
title: Notification badge stays stale

condition: Tapping a notification opens the destination it names.
task: Tap a notification and assert it opens the destination it names.
title: Notification opens the wrong screen

condition: Biometrics are a fast re-entry only; they never skip initial login/OTP/passcode.
expectedBuggy: Biometrics unlock straight from login — the ladder is skipped.
expectedClean: Biometrics only re-enter from the passcode stage.
task: From a fresh launch (login stage) assert a biometric unlock does NOT skip login/OTP/passcode.
title: Biometrics bypass the auth ladder

condition: Under a right-to-left layout, rows mirror correctly (start/end, not hard-coded left/right).
expectedBuggy: A row stays left-to-right — hard-coded left/right doesn't mirror.
task: Enable RTL (dev menu), open Transactions, and assert the rows mirror correctly.
title: Row doesn't mirror under RTL

condition: Grouping and decimal separators follow the selected locale (e.g. 1.234,56 in de-DE).
expectedBuggy: Grouping is stuck on en-US regardless of locale.
task: Select the de-DE locale (dev menu) and assert the sample number groups as 1.234.567,89.
title: Number grouping ignores the locale

condition: The currency symbol sits where the locale expects (before in en-US, after in de-DE).
expectedBuggy: Symbol always placed before the amount (en-US style).
expectedClean: Symbol placed per locale (after in de-DE, before in en-US).
task: Select de-DE and assert the currency symbol follows the amount (e.g. 1.234,56 €), not before it.
title: Currency symbol placed wrong for the locale

condition: Applying a saved template prefills its exact saved amount.
expectedClean: Template prefills its exact saved amount.
task: On Transfer, tap the Rent template and assert the amount field prefills its saved value (1200.00).
title: Payment template prefills the wrong amount

condition: A large transfer is blocked until identity (KYC) is verified.
expectedBuggy: Unverified user can still send a large transfer.
expectedClean: Large transfer blocked until KYC is verified.
task: Turn KYC off (dev menu), enter a €2000 transfer, and assert Continue stays disabled.
title: Unverified KYC still sends large transfers

condition: A virtual card shows a distinct virtual number, never the real PAN.
expectedBuggy: Virtual card leaks the real card PAN.
expectedClean: Virtual card shows a distinct number.
task: Create a virtual card and assert its number differs from the real card PAN.
title: Virtual card exposes the real card number

condition: The advertised APR equals the rate used to compute the monthly payment.
expectedBuggy: Payment reflects a higher rate than the advertised APR.
expectedClean: Payment computed at the advertised APR.
task: On the loan screen, assert the monthly payment matches the advertised APR (7.9%).
title: Loan APR understated vs the rate charged
